license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfypjpvn
title: Phosphate Buffered Saline (PBS)
author: Neilier Junior

steps_raw.instruction: pH 7.4 150 mM NaCl 10 mM Potassium Phosphate buffer Prepare 1 L, PBS by dissolving 8.7 g, NaCl , 1.82 g, K2HPO4 • 3H2O and 0.23 g, KH2PO4 in 1 L, distilled water .
A variation of PBS can also be prepared as follows: 137 millimolar (mM), NaCl 2.7 millimolar (mM), KCl 10 millimolar (mM), Na2HPO4 1.76 millimolar (mM), KH2PO4
